calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-06-17 is admitted to probate. Duggan A. Jensen is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-22-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2024 Continued To Feb-13-24 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 202
